input.tenant_message: Hi, my refrigerator stopped cooling sometime overnight and everything inside is now warm. I noticed the freezer is also not cold — the ice cream is completely melted and the meat I had in there feels thawed. I'm worried about food safety and I've already thrown out a bunch of stuff. This is really urgent because I have a baby at home and need a working fridge.

ai_output.recommended_action: Dispatch an appliance technician within 24 hours to inspect the refrigerator compressor, condenser coils, and refrigerant level. Advise tenant to discard all perishables that have been above 40°F for more than 2 hours. Provide a temporary mini-fridge if repair will be delayed beyond same day.
